base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of ninpo_jump_slash — a projectile from 1988 ninja gaiden. Art of Jump Slash — invincible upward-leap attack. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Art of Jump Slash — invincible upward-leap attack
